title: Modi, Netanyahu praise each other in address to Israeli Knesset
fullText: NewsFeed“A representative of one ancient civilisation, addressing another.” India’s Narendra Modi and Israel’s Benjamin Netanyahu spoke of each other’s countries in grand, civilisational terms during an address to the Israeli Knesset.Published On 25 Feb 2026
summary: Narendra Modi and Benjamin Netanyahu spoke of each other’s countries in civilisational terms to the Israeli Knesset.
